notes: Cora's driver loop. DRIVE / WATCH MIRROR / ANNOUNCE / PULL OVER as starters. Miles is the positive doom-clock; Fuel is the spendable currency. The bus is always somewhere on the route; DRIVE moves it forward, PULL OVER stops it.

cards.title: DRIVE
cards.flavor: Keep going. The road keeps going. Miles tick up; fuel ticks down.

cards.title: WATCH MIRROR
cards.flavor: Check the aisle without turning your head. See who needs you.

cards.title: ANNOUNCE
cards.flavor: Call the next stop. Passengers who need to get off get ready.

cards.title: PULL OVER
cards.flavor: Pull onto the shoulder. Miles don't tick. Fuel doesn't spend. You can sit with a passenger.

cards.title: REFUEL
cards.flavor: Pull into a station on the shoulder. Top off. Cora knows the attendant.

cards.title: THE LONG HAUL
cards.flavor: Fix your eyes on the road. The bus advances two miles without spending fuel and Doubt drops by 2.

cards.title: CB CHATTER
cards.flavor: Talk to another driver on channel 17. They tell you what's ahead.

cards.title: UNDERSEAT PICKUP
cards.flavor: Pull something dropped from under the seats. Give it to whoever owns it.
